description:
A video and audio player which can play most formats and codecs.

QMPlay2 is a video and audio player. It can play all formats supported by FFmpeg, libmodplug (including J2B and SFX). It also supports Audio CD, raw files, Rayman 2 music and chiptunes. It contains YouTube and MyFreeMP3 browser.
- Wayland: fix missing AudioCD and Tone generator context menus,
- always close panels with small delay when mouse leaves,
- fix window positioning on multi-monitor configuration,
- Wayland: fix video freeze on some compositors,
- remove character limit for yt-dlp parameters,
- ALSA: add SND_PCM_FORMAT_S24_3LE format,
- display size grip on Windows,
